name: Best Chocolate Brownie
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces bittersweet chocolate (high-quality), broken into pieces
4 ounces bittersweet chocolate (top quality), coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter and flour a 9x9x2-inch square cake pan.
3. Sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt onto a sheet of waxed paper.
4. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate and butter over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally until smooth. Remove from heat.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs and sugar with an electric mixer on high speed until slightly thickened, about 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Add the melted chocolate mixture to the egg mixture and mix on medium for 30 seconds.
7. Add the sifted flour mixture to the bowl and mix on low for 10 seconds, then on medium for another 10 seconds.
8. Stir in the sour cream with a spatula until well combined.
9. Fold in the chopped chocolate with a rubber spatula.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and spread evenly.
11. Bake for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Allow the brownies to cool for 10 to 15 minutes before cutting with a serrated knife.
